name: EVOLUTION PETROLEUM CORP
business: Evolution Petroleum Corporation is an independent energy company focused on onshore oil and natural gas properties in the United States. The company holds non-operated working interests in producing properties. It sells crude oil, natural gas, and natural gas liquids to various purchasers under short-term contracts at market-based prices.

exposures.sentence: Evolution Petroleum Corporation is an independent energy company focused on maximizing total returns to its shareholders through the ownership of and investment in onshore oil and natural gas properties in the United States.

Our non-operated interests in the Delhi Field, a CO2-EOR project, consist of approximately 24% average net working interest, with an associated 19% revenue interest and separate overriding royalty and mineral interests of approximately 7% yielding a total average net revenue interest of approximately 26%.

catalysts.event: Quarterly dividend of $0.12 per common share payable September 30, 2025
catalysts.sentence: On September 11, 2025, Evolution’s Board of Directors approved and declared a quarterly dividend of $0.12 per common share payable September 30, 2025.

catalysts.event: Five gross wells expected to be brought online at SCOOP/STACK during fiscal year 2026
catalysts.sentence: At SCOOP/STACK, we currently expect five gross wells to be brought online during fiscal year 2026.

catalysts.event: Drilling permits for six wells at Chaveroo Field expected by end of third quarter fiscal 2026
catalysts.sentence: At the Chaveroo Field, we expect to have drilling permits in hand for the next round of six wells before the end of the third quarter of fiscal 2026.
